message:
feat(core): add trie.rs — compact prefix trie for command completion and path matching (ft-283h4.29)

Implement a prefix trie over byte strings with O(|key|) insert, lookup,
remove, and prefix queries. Supports auto-completion via keys_with_prefix,
longest matching prefix, longest shared prefix, and sorted key enumeration.

API: new, insert, contains, starts_with, keys_with_prefix, remove,
longest_common_prefix, longest_shared_prefix, all_keys, clear, stats.

Includes 25 inline unit tests and 35+ proptest property-based tests
covering: insert/contains consistency, duplicate handling, remove
correctness/isolation, prefix query correctness, longest common prefix
validity/maximality, all_keys ordering/completeness, clone
equivalence/independence, clear, serde roundtrip, stats consistency.

Also registers rope module (another agent's work).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
